summary: Completed testing of iteration 8 - Smart Import and Chief Strategist Agent features. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/import/smart with Hebrew text returns item with detected title and folder_id
POST /api/import/smart correctly classifies torah content (AI classification working)
POST /api/import/smart correctly classifies business content (AI classification working)
POST /api/import/smart returns 400 for empty text
POST /api/import/smart returns 400 for whitespace-only text
GET /api/agents/strategist/sessions returns sessions list
GET /api/agents/strategist/chat/{session_id} returns messages (empty for non-existent)
DELETE /api/agents/strategist/session/{session_id} deletes session
Regression: GET /api/folders returns 4 folders with counts
Regression: GET /api/content/items works
Regression: GET /api/backup/export works
Frontend: Dashboard loads with 'quick-import-btn' visible
Frontend: Dashboard loads with 'quick-strategist-btn' visible
Frontend: Clicking import button opens import panel with textarea
Frontend: Floating strategist button visible on dashboard
Frontend: Floating strategist button visible on /library page
Frontend: Clicking floating button navigates to /strategist
Frontend: Strategist page loads at /strategist with chat interface
Frontend: Strategist page shows suggested questions
Frontend: Strategist page has chat input area with send button
Frontend: Floating strategist button NOT visible on /strategist page
seed_data_creation: Test items created during smart import tests were cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 adds: 1) Smart Import - POST /api/import/smart with AI auto-detection of title and folder classification (torah/business/mental_snacks/general), 2) Chief Strategist Agent - chat interface with RAG at /strategist page, endpoints: GET /api/agents/strategist/sessions, GET /api/agents/strategist/chat/{session_id}, DELETE /api/agents/strategist/session/{session_id}, POST /api/agents/strategist/chat (calls AI - not tested), 3) Floating strategist button on all screens except /strategist. No authentication required. Hebrew RTL. Light theme with orange/green SaaS palette.
